# Vesper Knowledge Base

## Vesper Knowledge Base

- [Knowledge Base](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/master.md)
- [Overview](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/overview.md): https://backoffice.onvesper.com
- [Global Labels & Languages](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/overview/global-labels.md)
- [International Sanctions](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/overview/international-sanctions.md)
- [Content](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/content.md)
- [Content Management](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/content/content-management.md)
- [Home & Browse](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/content/content-management/home.md)
- [Creating Hero Slides](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/content/content-management/creating-hero-images.md)
- [Heroes: Best Practices](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/content/content-management/creating-hero-images/heroes-best-practices.md)
- [Animated Heroes](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/content/content-management/creating-hero-images/animated-heroes.md): Surfacing content within a hero image
- [Card-Style Hero](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/content/content-management/creating-hero-images/card-style-hero.md): A smaller, card-style hero (also known as a "Skinny Hero") with enhanced metadata functionality
- [Creating Rows](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/content/content-management/creating-rows.md)
- [Step By Step Row Creation Guide](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/content/content-management/creating-rows/step-by-step-row-creation-guide.md)
- [Live Event Rows and Tournament Filter](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/content/content-management/creating-rows/live-event-rows-and-tournament-filter.md)
- [Creating and Editing an EPG Row](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/content/content-management/creating-rows/creating-an-epg-row.md)
- [Content Order](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/content/content-management/creating-rows/content-order.md)
- [Curating Grouped Content](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/content/content-management/creating-rows/curating-grouped-content.md)
- [Playlists/Seasons Carousels](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/content/content-management/creating-rows/curating-grouped-content/playlists-seasons-carousels.md)
- [Series Carousel](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/content/content-management/creating-rows/curating-grouped-content/series-carousel.md)
- [Premiere VOD](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/content/content-management/creating-rows/premiere-vod.md)
- [Top 10 Row](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/content/content-management/creating-rows/top-10-row.md): Showcasing and promoting specific content on your service.
- [Title Rows (Mixed content)](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/content/content-management/creating-rows/title-rows-mixed-content.md): Mix standalone VOD or Movie Titles with Series Titles
- [Row Segmentation](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/content/content-management/creating-rows/row-segmentation.md)
- [Managing your content](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/content/content-management/managing-your-content.md)
- [Hero Segmentation](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/content/content-management/segmentation.md)
- [Content Segmentation Priority and rules](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/content/content-management/content-segmentation-priority-and-rules.md)
- [Sponsorship Logo Placements](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/content/content-management/sponsorship-logo-placements.md): Brand partnerships are an important revenue driver for streaming services. There are opportunities to include sponsorship branding within Vesper platform creatives to deliver against this opportunity.
- [Geo-templates and geo-policies on Vesper Back Office](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/content/content-management/geo-templates-and-geo-policies-on-vesper-back-office.md)
- [Sections](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/content/content-management/sections.md)
- [Adding SEO metadata to sections](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/content/content-management/sections/adding-seo-metadata-to-sections.md): Provide static descriptions and previews to search engines, social networks & messaging apps
- [Custom Background Sections​](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/content/content-management/sections/custom-background-sections.md): Custom section backgrounds that differ from the services default background.
- [Back Office - Glossary of creatives](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/content/content-management/back-office-glossary-of-creatives.md)
- [Optional Partitions](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/content/content-management/optional-partitions.md)
- [Promo Notifications](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/content/notifications.md)
- [Embed Player](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/content/embed-player.md)
- [Embed Player Config](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/content/embed-player/embed-player-config.md)

- [Plugins](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/content/plugins.md)
- [Themeable LiveLike](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/content/plugins/themeable-livelike.md)
- [iFrame Specifications](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/content/plugins/iframe-specifications.md)

- [Make/Revoke a Customers VIP](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/users-1/managing-a-user-account/make-revoke-a-customers-vip.md)

- [Refund a Customer](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/users-1/managing-a-user-account/refund-a-customer.md)
- [Refund a Gift](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/users-1/managing-a-user-account/refund-a-gift.md)
- [Remove Customers Payment Method](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/users-1/managing-a-user-account/remove-customers-payment-method.md)
- [Reset Customers Password](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/users-1/managing-a-user-account/reset-customers-password.md)
- [Suspending A Customer Account](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/users-1/managing-a-user-account/suspending-a-customer-account.md)
- [Grant Entitlement via Vesper Admin](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/users-1/managing-a-user-account/grant-entitlement-via-vesper-admin.md): Grant Entitlement via Vesper Admin
- [Vesper Insights](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights.md): Introduction
- [Analytics Dashboards](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards.md)
- [Dashboard Controls](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-controls.md)
- [Filters](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-controls/filters.md): Allow user to set filters for all the applicable fields
- [Segments](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-controls/segments.md): Allow you to monitor criteria sets over time for user levels falling into or out of validity
- [Targeting](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-controls/targeting.md): Deliver Segments of users to 3rd party marketing tooling for enhanced engagement
- [Cohort](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-controls/cohort.md): Allows you to monitor a specific group of users across various criteria
- [Export](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-controls/export.md): Capture a snapshot of the current dashboard
- [Underlying Data](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-controls/underlying-data.md)
- [Download](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-controls/download.md): Export raw data of current qualifying user data
- [Realm Selection](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-controls/realm-selection.md)
- [Dashboard Deep-Dive](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-deep-dive.md)
- [Order Management](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-deep-dive/order-management.md): Helps identify engagement opportunities and conversion tactics on registrants and how to monetize customers
- [Churn Trends](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-deep-dive/churn-trends.md)
- [Churn](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-deep-dive/churn-trends/churn.md): Helps the business understand the churn mix over variable order attributes.
- [Churn Rate](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-deep-dive/churn-trends/churn-rate.md): Shows subscriptions and terminations over time along with the corresponding Churn Rates.
- [Churn Tenure](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-deep-dive/churn-trends/churn-tenure.md)
- [Free Trial Marketing](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-deep-dive/free-trial-marketing.md)
- [Free Trials](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-deep-dive/free-trial-marketing/free-trials.md): Shows only free trials in order to formulate a strategy to convert them to paying customers once their free trial period is completed.
- [Free Trial Conversion Rate](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-deep-dive/free-trial-marketing/free-trial-conversion-rate.md)
- [Free Trial Churn Trends](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-deep-dive/free-trial-marketing/free-trial-churn-trends.md)
- [Revenue Tracking and Trending](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-deep-dive/revenue-tracking-and-trending.md): Provides insights about the sources and trendings of revenue.
- [All Watch Data](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-deep-dive/all-watch-data.md)
- [Analyze Usage](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-deep-dive/all-watch-data/analyze-usage.md): Helps identify engagement opportunities and conversion tactics on registrants and monetize customers.
- [Content Viewership](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-deep-dive/all-watch-data/content-viewership.md)
- [Viewership Concurrency](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-deep-dive/all-watch-data/viewership-concurrency.md): Used to track when and how often viewers are most active
- [Subscriber Management](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-deep-dive/subscriber-management.md)
- [Active Subscribers](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-deep-dive/subscriber-management/active-subscribers.md): This dashboard shows active subscribers with the ability to visualize by various categories.
- [Subscription Tenure](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-deep-dive/subscriber-management/subscription-tenure.md)
- [Subscriber Engagement](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-deep-dive/subscriber-management/subscriber-engagement.md)
- [Customer Insights](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-deep-dive/customer-insights.md)
- [Customer Registrations](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-deep-dive/customer-insights/customer-registrations.md)
- [RFE Matrix](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-deep-dive/customer-insights/rfe-matrix.md)
- [RFM Matrix](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-deep-dive/customer-insights/rfm-matrix.md)
- [User Access History](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-deep-dive/customer-insights/user-access-history.md)
- [Service Reliability Analysis](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-deep-dive/service-reliability-analysis.md): Analysing quality of experience delivered to your end-customers
- [Overall Experience](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-deep-dive/service-reliability-analysis/overall-experience.md): Overall Viewer Experience is a high-level score from 0 to 100 that measures the QoE (Quality of Experience).
- [Playback Success](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-deep-dive/service-reliability-analysis/playback-success.md)
- [Startup Time](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-deep-dive/service-reliability-analysis/startup-time.md)
- [Smoothness](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-deep-dive/service-reliability-analysis/smoothness.md)
- [Video Quality](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-deep-dive/service-reliability-analysis/video-quality.md)
- [Retention Analysis](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-deep-dive/retention-analysis.md)
- [Subscription Retention](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-deep-dive/retention-analysis/subscription-retention.md)
- [Retention Analysis](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/analytics-dashboards/dashboard-deep-dive/retention-analysis/retention-analysis.md)
- [Vesper Insights Use Cases](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/vesper-insights-use-cases.md): Examples of how to use Vesper Insights to answer your data questions
- [VI Use Case - Identify your peak concurrency viewership](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/vesper-insights-use-cases/vi-use-case-identify-your-peak-concurrency-viewership.md): Vesper Insights can help you restructure your content scheduling planning and inspire content creation thanks to the data gathered from the Viewership Concurrency dashboard.
- [VI Use Case - Monitor which promotions generate most orders](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/vesper-insights-use-cases/vi-use-case-monitor-which-promotions-generate-most-orders.md): Vesper Insights can help you determine how promotions, or vouchers, are helping you driving more orders to the platform.
- [VI Use Case - Realising revenue from non-premium signups](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/vesper-insights-use-cases/vi-use-case-realising-revenue-from-non-premium-signups.md)
- [VI Use Case - Reward your super users](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/vesper-insights-use-cases/vi-use-case-reward-your-super-users.md): Vesper Insights can help you identify users consuming most of your platform's content so you can provide them with a token for their support.
- [VI Use Case - Identify which content is driving most sign ups](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/vesper-insights-use-cases/vi-use-case-identify-which-content-is-driving-most-sign-ups.md): Vesper Insights can assist you in analysing the first content a user watched after signing up to your service, helping you strategise around your content acquisition.
- [VI Use Case - Project incoming cash flow based on next billing date](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/vesper-insights-use-cases/vi-use-case-project-incoming-cash-flow-based-on-next-billing-date.md): Vesper Insights can assist you in projecting incoming revenue by detecting users approaching a subscription renewal over a determined period.
- [VI Use Case - Monitor platform access of users with external entitlements](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/vesper-insights-use-cases/vi-use-case-monitor-platform-access-of-users-with-external-entitlements.md)
- [VI Use Case - Find my most (or least) completed Videos](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/vesper-insights-use-cases/vi-use-case-find-my-most-or-least-completed-videos.md): Using Vesper Insights to identify VOD content that is keeping your customers engaged
- [VI Use Case - Identify Casting Usage](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/vesper-insights-use-cases/vi-use-case-identify-casting-usage.md): Vesper Insights can help you track how many users are casting content to TV devices, providing valuable data for identifying potential opportunities to expand into new TV markets

- [Segments vs Cohorts: What's the difference?](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/faqs/segments-vs-cohorts-whats-the-difference.md)

- [User\_Access\_History](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/data-sync/data-sync-feed-file-definitions/user_access_history.md)
- [Guest\_Profile](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/data-sync/data-sync-feed-file-definitions/guest_profile.md)

- [Helpful SQL for Key Metrics](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/vesper-insights/data-sync/helpful-sql-for-key-metrics.md)

- [DEPRECATED Menu items](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/administration/deprecated-menu-items.md)
- [Menu items](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/administration/menu-items.md): Use the Dynamic menu system to customize Vesper application menus to your own brand, and expand the experiences offered in your streaming app with web views and plugins
- [Header and Menu Configuration](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/administration/menu-items/header-and-menu-configuration.md)
- [Account Menu](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/administration/menu-items/account-menu.md): Take full control of the "account" menu in Vesper
- [Audit](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/administration/audit.md)
- [IP Overrides](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/administration/ip-overrides.md)
- [EXID Injection](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/administration/exid-injection.md): EXID Injections / Anti-Piracy Measures
- [Marketing Partner Management](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/administration/marketing-partner-management.md): Conversion reporting allows you to optimise and measure the effectiveness of marketing spend. The Marketing Partner Management tool allows you to track this metric right within the Vesper platform.
- [TV-based conversion tracking](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/administration/marketing-partner-management/tv-based-conversion-tracking.md)
- [Web-based conversion tracking](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/administration/marketing-partner-management/web-based-conversion-tracking.md)
- [Post-back URL](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/administration/marketing-partner-management/post-back-url.md)
- [User Consent Management](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/administration/user-consent-management.md)
- [Checkout Consent Management](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/administration/user-consent-management/checkout-consent-management.md): Adding further consent required to complete a purchase
- [Content Consent Management](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/administration/user-consent-management/content-consent-management.md)

- [Gifting](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/licences/gifting.md): Gifting allows end-users to purchase and redeem licenses as gifts. It is a great feature to leverage around festive periods to promote your service and maximize acquisition.
- [Price Version Migration](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/back-office/licences/price-version-migration.md): The Price Version Migration tool allows you to schedule in a price increase or decrease for web users. You will have the flexibility to configure price changes for new or existing subscribers.

- [Typed Tags: ENUM Batch Upload](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/dve/video/typed-tags/typed-tags-enum-batch-upload.md): ENUM Typed Tags often require large sets of predefined values at creation. Batch Uploading will  avoid needing to create values one at a time, and allow for scale as metadata volumes grow.
- [Typed Tags: Search](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/dve/video/typed-tags/typed-tags-search.md): Typed Tags enable discoverability and structure across the platform, but as Typed Tag volumes grow, content managers may struggle to efficiently find and apply the correct Typed Tags and ENUM values.

- [Batch Video Upload via UI](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/dve/batch-video-upload-via-ui.md)
- [Uploading Batch VOD's](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/dve/batch-video-upload-via-ui/uploading-batch-vods.md)
- [Prepare your video assets](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/dve/batch-video-upload-via-ui/uploading-batch-vods/prepare-your-video-assets.md)
- [Upload your batch](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/dve/batch-video-upload-via-ui/uploading-batch-vods/upload-your-batch.md)
- [Review and approve your batch](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/dve/batch-video-upload-via-ui/uploading-batch-vods/review-and-approve-your-batch.md)
- [S3 management](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/dve/batch-video-upload-via-ui/uploading-batch-vods/s3-management.md)
- [Updating Batch VOD's](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/dve/batch-video-upload-via-ui/updating-batch-vods.md)
- [Download your Catalogue](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/dve/batch-video-upload-via-ui/updating-batch-vods/download-your-catalogue.md): In order to update a number of VOD assets at the same time you need to first download the current state of your video catalogue.
- [Editing your CSV](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/dve/batch-video-upload-via-ui/updating-batch-vods/editing-your-csv.md): Next you need to make the necessary edits to your CSV
- [Re-uploading your changes](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/dve/batch-video-upload-via-ui/updating-batch-vods/re-uploading-your-changes.md): Finally you now need to re-upload the catalogue file so that your changes can be processed.

- [Smart Subtitle Preferences](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/consumer-experience/smart-subtitle-preferences.md): Smart Subtitle Preferences learns per-audio-language subtitle choices and applies them automatically,
- [Hiding Episodic VODs from Frontend](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/consumer-experience/hiding-episodic-vods-from-frontend.md): This feature provides control over which types of content (Seasons, Series, Single Episodes) are prominently displayed (or not displayed) across search results and content rows.
- [Watchlists](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/consumer-experience/watchlists.md)
- [My List](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/consumer-experience/my-list.md): A flexible listing that can be displayed on the home page to make it easier for users to access their favorite series.
- [Grid View](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/consumer-experience/grid-view.md): An alternative approach to browse, filter and sort content
- [Social Sharing](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/consumer-experience/social-sharing.md): Social Sharing is a feature that enables end-users to generate sharable links, as well as use mobile operating systems' native sharing mechanisms to send on to contacts and social media platforms.

- [Series Interstitial: Vertical list view of episodes](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/consumer-experience/interstitial-pages/series-interstitial-vertical-list-view-of-episodes.md)
- [Series Interstitial: Season selector](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/consumer-experience/interstitial-pages/series-interstitial-season-selector.md)
- [Series Interstitial: Tabbed navigation](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/consumer-experience/interstitial-pages/series-interstitial-tabbed-navigation.md)
- [Related Content](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/consumer-experience/related-content.md)
- [Google Analytics Integration](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/consumer-experience/google-analytics-integration.md): Send events from the Vesper platform into GA
- [Email Domain Correction](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/consumer-experience/email-domain-correction.md): Corrects misspelled email addresses in real-time to improve user registration process.
- [Continue Watching Updates](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/consumer-experience/continue-watching-updates.md): We have made a number of updates to the continue watching row, to provide a more consistent experience for content organised by series and season.
- [Payment Recovery](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/payment-recovery.md): Churn prevention tool
- [Captcha](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/security/captcha.md): Tackling bots and malicious actors on your service
- [DRM: Overview and FAQs](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/security/drm-overview-and-faqs.md)
- [Multi Key DRM Support for LIVE](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/security/drm-overview-and-faqs/multi-key-drm-support-for-live.md): Highest playback quality when using multi key DRM, by device
- [OneTrust](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/consent-management-platforms/onetrust.md)
- [Configure OneTrust](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/consent-management-platforms/onetrust/configure-onetrust.md)
- [Publish Script for Web](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/consent-management-platforms/onetrust/publish-script-for-web.md)
- [CTV Apps](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/consent-management-platforms/onetrust/ctv-apps.md)
- [FAQs](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/consent-management-platforms/faqs.md)
- [What is cookie consent?](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/consent-management-platforms/faqs/what-is-cookie-consent.md)
- [What is Cookie Law?](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/consent-management-platforms/faqs/what-is-cookie-law.md)
- [What are Geolocation Rules?](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/consent-management-platforms/faqs/what-are-geolocation-rules.md)

## Onboarding Documentation

- [Vesper Onboarding Guide](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/master.md): At the core of Deltatre is Vesper, an end-to-end streaming platform designed to simplify the video workflow and remove the technical barriers of launching an OTT service.
- [Platform Set Up Overview](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/platform-set-up/platform-set-up-overview.md): This section lays the groundwork for the platform, ensuring you have the desired experience set up on your new streaming service.
- [Platform Configuration](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/platform-set-up/platform-configuration.md): The platform configuration determines the look and feel of your realm and what users will see when they land on your platform.
- [Consumer Experience Overview](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview.md)
- [Access & Authentication](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/access-and-authentication.md): This section relates to how a customer can find the platform, registration (sign up) or login
- [Configuring your customers landing page](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/access-and-authentication/configuring-your-customers-landing-page.md): This section relates to how your users will find your streaming service
- [Existing Company website](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/access-and-authentication/configuring-your-customers-landing-page/existing-company-website.md)
- [Marketing Page](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/access-and-authentication/configuring-your-customers-landing-page/marketing-page.md): A marketing page on a streaming service is a webpage specifically designed to promote and attract potential users or subscribers to the streaming platform.
- [Platform Homepage](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/access-and-authentication/configuring-your-customers-landing-page/platform-homepage.md)
- [Setting up your domain](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/access-and-authentication/configuring-your-customers-landing-page/setting-up-your-domain.md): A domain, in simple terms, is a unique address where you can find a specific website on the internet
- [SEO?](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/access-and-authentication/configuring-your-customers-landing-page/seo.md)
- [Configuring the Customer Login](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/access-and-authentication/configuring-the-customer-login.md): The different login & authentication methods determine how a user can access the service. There are various different methods that can be used and all have a unique flow.
- [Vesper ID](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/access-and-authentication/configuring-the-customer-login/vesper-id.md)
- [Social Logins](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/access-and-authentication/configuring-the-customer-login/social-logins.md): Social login, also known as social sign-in or social authentication, is a mechanism that allows users to log into a website or application using their existing social media credentials.
- [Single Sign On (SSO)](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/access-and-authentication/configuring-the-customer-login/single-sign-on-sso.md)
- [Configuring the Customer Registration](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/access-and-authentication/configuring-the-customer-registration.md): The registration flow in the customer journey is important and determines what is presented, when to the customer, as well as how it looks from a creative perspective.
- [Platform Sign Up Fields](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/access-and-authentication/configuring-the-customer-registration/platform-sign-up-fields.md): The sign-up fields sits within the sign up & account creation flow.
- [Account Creation Order](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/access-and-authentication/configuring-the-customer-registration/account-creation-order.md): The account creation flow allows individuals to register for a new account to access your streaming service.
- [App Content](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/app-content.md): App Content refers to all the media and editorial assets that appear within the streaming application. This workstream ensures the right content is available, properly presented,
- [Platform branding & Localisation](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/app-content/platform-branding-and-localisation.md): The branding visible on the platform is important to ensure that your customers know that this is your streaming service.
- [Platform Colours](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/app-content/platform-branding-and-localisation/platform-colours.md): The right platform colours help provide the overarching brand identity and design aesthetic for your streaming service.
- [Platform Font](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/app-content/platform-branding-and-localisation/platform-font.md): Fonts are used across various elements of your streaming service such as menu options, titles or descriptions.
- [Platform Logo](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/app-content/platform-branding-and-localisation/platform-logo.md): The platform logo is displayed prominently across your applications to reinforce brand recognition.
- [Platform Emails](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/app-content/platform-branding-and-localisation/platform-emails.md): Our platform offers standard, templated emails that focus around account setup, platform management, transactional and feature specific emails.
- [Automated emails](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/app-content/platform-branding-and-localisation/platform-emails/automated-emails.md): Our platform offers standard, templated emails that focus around account setup, platform management, transactional and feature specific emails.
- [Email Logo](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/app-content/platform-branding-and-localisation/platform-emails/email-logo.md)
- [Sender email address](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/app-content/platform-branding-and-localisation/platform-emails/sender-email-address.md)
- [Localisation](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/app-content/platform-branding-and-localisation/localisation.md): The platform supports the following:
- [Platform Default Locale](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/app-content/platform-branding-and-localisation/localisation/platform-default-locale.md)
- [Platform Labels](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/app-content/platform-branding-and-localisation/localisation/platform-labels.md): Platform labels help to signpost your customer around your platform.
- [Language Toggle](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/app-content/platform-branding-and-localisation/localisation/language-toggle.md): If you are leveraging multiple languages on your streaming service, you can enable a language dropdown menu on the web application.
- [Navigation Menu](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/app-content/navigation-menu.md): The navigation menu refers to the user interface element that allows subscribers to browse and access sections and content categories on your streaming service.
- [Navigation Menu Style](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/app-content/navigation-menu/navigation-menu-style.md): This relates to the positioning of the navigation menu item across Web & Mobile and can vary across the applications.
- [User Profiles](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/app-content/user-profiles.md)
- [Capturing User Consent](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/app-content/capturing-user-consent.md): We can capture user consent on the platform or via a 3rd party tool
- [Via our platform tooling](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/app-content/capturing-user-consent/via-our-platform-tooling.md): Platform consent will ask your customer to acknowledge & agree to specific terms within your streaming service. These responses will be captured in our vesper reporting.
- [Via 3rd party tooling (OneTrust)](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/app-content/capturing-user-consent/via-3rd-party-tooling-onetrust.md): OneTrust is a consent management platform that helps companies comply with privacy laws like GDPR, CCPA, and ePrivacy by centralising user consent tracking.
- [Platform Cookie Policy](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/app-content/capturing-user-consent/platform-cookie-policy.md): The role of a this cookie policy consent is to ask for consent, give a signal once cookie preferences are given, and store the cookie preferences in the browser as a cookie.
- [Configuring Watchlists](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/app-content/configuring-watchlists.md)
- [Configuring Favourite teams](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/app-content/configuring-favourite-teams.md)
- [Configuring Download To Go (D2G)](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/app-content/configuring-download-to-go-d2g.md)
- [Application Build & Submission](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission.md): When you're building and submitting an app to app stores (iOS App Store and Google Play Store), you’ll need a combination of design, technical, and business assets.
- [App questionnaire](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/app-questionnaire.md)
- [Apple](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/apple.md): This section explains how to prepare, configure, and manage your Apple iOS and tvOS applications on the Vesper platform.
- [Developer Account Access](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/apple/developer-account-access.md): To build and manage your Apple apps, Deltatre requires access to your Apple Developer Account.
- [Creatives](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/apple/creatives.md): App creatives are the visual assets displayed in the App Store and within your application.
- [Metadata](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/apple/metadata.md): App metadata defines how your app appears and is discovered in the App Store. Providing complete, accurate information speeds up the review and approval process.
- [In-App Purchases (IAPs)](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/apple/in-app-purchases-iaps.md): To monetise your Apple apps, you’ll need to set up payments and configure In-App Purchases (IAPs) in App Store Connect, then map them to your licences on Vesper Back Office.
- [Testing](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/apple/testing.md): Before publishing, you should test your iOS, iPadOS and tvOS apps to ensure quality. This helps catch issues and speeds up approval.
- [Universal Search on Apple TV](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/apple/universal-search-on-apple-tv.md)
- [Amazon](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/amazon.md): This section explains how to prepare, configure, and manage your Amazon Fire Tablet & TV applications on the Vesper platform.
- [Developer Account Access](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/amazon/developer-account-access.md): To build and manage your Amazon apps, Deltatre requires access to your Amazon Developer Console Account.
- [Creatives](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/amazon/creatives.md): App creatives are the visual assets displayed in the Appstore and within your application. To correctly display your application icon on Amazon devices, you must comply with Amazon’s specifications.
- [Metadata](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/amazon/metadata.md): App metadata defines how your app appears and is discovered in the Appstore. Providing complete, accurate information speeds up the review and approval process.
- [In-App Purchases (IAPs)](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/amazon/in-app-purchases-iaps.md): To monetise your Amazon apps, you’ll need to set up payments and configure In-App Purchases (IAPs) in the Amazon Developer Console, then map them to your licences on Vesper Back Office.
- [Testing](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/amazon/testing.md): Before publishing, you should test your Amazon apps to ensure quality. This helps catch issues and speeds up approval.
- [Universal Search on Amazon FireTV](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/amazon/universal-search-on-amazon-firetv.md)
- [Chromecast](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/chromecast.md)
- [Comcast](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/comcast.md): This section explains how to prepare, configure, and manage your Comcast applications on the Vesper platform.
- [Developer Account Creation](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/comcast/developer-account-creation.md): Comcast requires that the rights-owner organisation (not Deltatre) holds the developer account, completes the registration process, and manages app submissions.
- [Creatives](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/comcast/creatives.md): App creatives are the visual assets displayed in the Comcast store and within your app. To correctly display your creatives on Comcast devices, you must comply with Comcast’s specifications.
- [Metadata](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/comcast/metadata.md): App metadata defines how your app appears and is discovered in the Comcast store. Providing complete, accurate information speeds up the review and approval process.
- [In-App Purchases (IAPs)](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/comcast/in-app-purchases-iaps.md): The Vesper platform does not currently support In-App Purchases on Comcast. All licence purchases must be handled externally, via the web checkout flow.
- [Testing & Submission](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/comcast/testing-and-submission.md): Once Deltatre provides the production app URL and final build, we recommend testing on both Xfinity and Xumo devices.
- [Embed Player](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/embed-player.md)
- [Google](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/google.md): This section explains how to prepare, configure, and manage your Android Mobile and Android TV applications on the Vesper platform.
- [Developer Account Access](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/google/developer-account-access.md): To build and manage your Google Play apps, Deltatre requires access to your Google Play Console Account.
- [Creatives](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/google/creatives.md): For Android Mobile & Android TV submissions to Google Play, you’ll need to supply creative assets (icons, banners, screenshots) that meet Google’s specifications.
- [Metadata](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/google/metadata.md): App metadata defines how your app appears and is discovered in the Google Play Store. Providing complete, accurate information speeds up the review and approval process.
- [In-App Purchases (IAPs)](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/google/in-app-purchases-iaps.md): To monetise your Google apps, you’ll need to set up payments and configure In-App Purchases (IAPs) in the Google Play Console, then map them to your licences on Vesper Back Office.
- [Testing](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/google/testing.md): Before publishing, you should test your Android Mobile and TV apps to ensure quality. This helps catch issues and speeds up approval.
- [Universal Search on Google](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/google/universal-search-on-google.md)
- [Hisense](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/hisense.md): These instructions relate to the steps required for Hisense TV applications distributed through the VIDAA app store.
- [Developer Account Access](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/hisense/developer-account-access.md): To register, submit and manage your Hisense VIDAA application, you will require a Hisense VIDAA Partner account. Deltatre will not have access to this portal, so you will manage the account yourself.
- [The VIDAA app questionnaire](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/hisense/the-vidaa-app-questionnaire.md): Before approving your application submission, Hisense will provide you with questionnaire regarding the technical capabilities of the application.
- [Creatives](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/hisense/creatives.md): App creatives are the visual assets used for your VIDAA store listing and in-app experience.
- [Metadata](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/hisense/metadata.md): App metadata defines how your app appears and is discovered in the App Store. Providing complete, accurate information speeds up the review and approval process.
- [In App Purchases (IAPs)](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/hisense/in-app-purchases-iaps.md): The Vesper platform does not currently support In-App Purchases on Hisense VIDAA. All licence purchases must be handled externally, via the web checkout flow.
- [Testing & Submission](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/hisense/testing-and-submission.md): Before publishing, you have the option to test your Hisense apps to ensure quality. This helps catch issues and speeds up approval.
- [Universal Search on Hisense](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/hisense/universal-search-on-hisense.md)
- [LG](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/lg.md): This section explains how to prepare, configure, and manage your LG WebOS TV application on the Vesper platform.
- [Developer Account Access](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/lg/developer-account-access.md): To build and manage your LG WebOS app, Deltatre requires access to your LG Seller Lounge Account.
- [Creatives](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/lg/creatives.md): App creatives are the visual assets displayed in the App Store and within your application. To correctly display your application icon on LG TVs, you must comply with LG’s specifications.
- [Metadata](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/lg/metadata.md): App metadata defines how your app appears and is discovered in the LG Content Store. Providing complete, accurate information speeds up the review and approval process.
- [In-App Purchases (IAPs)](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/lg/in-app-purchases-iaps.md): The Vesper platform does not currently support In-App Purchases on LG. All licence purchases must be handled externally, via the web checkout flow.
- [Testing](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/lg/testing.md)
- [Install the webOS Command Line Interface](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/lg/testing/install-the-webos-command-line-interface.md)
- [Install Developer Mode app](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/lg/testing/install-developer-mode-app.md)
- [Connect your webOS and computer](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/lg/testing/connect-your-webos-and-computer.md)
- [Install the app on your webOS](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/lg/testing/install-the-app-on-your-webos.md)
- [LG - Run the app on your webOS](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/lg/testing/lg-run-the-app-on-your-webos.md)
- [Universal Search on LG](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/lg/universal-search-on-lg.md)
- [Roku](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/roku.md): This section explains how to prepare, configure, and manage your Roku applications on the Vesper platform.
- [Developer Account Access](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/roku/developer-account-access.md): To build and manage your apps, Deltatre requires access to your Roku Developer Account.
- [Creatives](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/roku/creatives.md): App creatives are the visual assets displayed in the Roku Channel Store and within your application/channel.
- [Metadata](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/roku/metadata.md): App metadata defines how your app appears and is discovered in the Roku Channel Store. Providing complete, accurate information speeds up the review and approval process.
- [In-App Purchases (IAPs)](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/roku/in-app-purchases-iaps.md): If you plan to monetise your Roku app (e.g., subscriptions or consumables), you’ll need to configure payment information and create in-app products within the Roku Developer Dashboard.
- [Testing](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/roku/testing.md): Before publishing, you should test your Roku apps to ensure quality. This helps catch issues and speeds up approval.
- [Universal Search on Roku](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/roku/universal-search-on-roku.md)
- [Sony (PS5)](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/sony-ps5.md): This section explains how to prepare, configure, and manage your Sony PlayStation 5 applications on the Vesper platform.
- [Developer Account Access](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/sony-ps5/developer-account-access.md): To build and manage your PlayStation app, we'll require access to your PlayStation Partners Account.
- [Creatives](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/sony-ps5/creatives.md): App creatives are the visual assets displayed in the PlayStation Store and within your application.
- [Metadata](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/sony-ps5/metadata.md): App metadata defines how your app appears and is discovered in the PlayStation Store.
- [In-App Purchases (IAPs)](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/sony-ps5/in-app-purchases-iaps.md): The Vesper platform does not currently support In-App Purchases on the PlayStation Store. All licence purchases must be handled externally, via the web checkout flow.
- [Testing](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/sony-ps5/testing.md): Before your app can be published on the PlayStation Store, it must pass Sony’s certification
- [Universal Search on Sony](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/sony-ps5/universal-search-on-sony.md)
- [Samsung](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/samsung.md): This section explains how to prepare, configure, and manage your Samsung Tizen TV application on the Vesper platform.
- [Developer Account Access](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/samsung/developer-account-access.md): To build and manage your Samsung Tizen app, Deltatre requires access to your Samsung TV Seller Office Account.
- [Creatives](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/samsung/creatives.md): App creatives are the visual assets displayed in the App Store and within your application. To correctly display your application icon on Samsung TVs, you must comply with Samsung’s specifications.
- [Metadata](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/samsung/metadata.md): App Store information is used across the client application storefront. It is a requirement for submission to the Samsung Store.
- [In-App Purchases (IAPs)](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/samsung/in-app-purchases-iaps.md): Samsung In-App Purchases (IAPs) are managed from the Samsung Checkout Digital Product Inventory (DPI), which uses the same credentials as your Samsung account.
- [Testing builds](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/samsung/testing-builds.md)
- [Testing .tmg file](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/samsung/testing-builds/testing-.tmg-file.md)
- [Testing .wgt file](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/samsung/testing-builds/testing-.wgt-file.md)
- [Enabling Developer mode on Samsung TV](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/samsung/testing-builds/testing-.wgt-file/enabling-developer-mode-on-samsung-tv.md)
- [Configuring Tizen Studio](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/samsung/testing-builds/testing-.wgt-file/configuring-tizen-studio.md)
- [Verifying sdb executable](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/samsung/testing-builds/testing-.wgt-file/verifying-sdb-executable.md)

- [Connecting to Your Samsung TV](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/samsung/testing-builds/testing-.wgt-file/connecting-to-your-samsung-tv.md)
- [Installing and launching the app on Samsung TV](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/samsung/testing-builds/testing-.wgt-file/installing-and-launching-the-app-on-samsung-tv.md)
- [Samsung Store - Popular Videos Row](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/samsung/samsung-store-popular-videos-row.md)
- [Universal Search on Samsung TV](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/samsung/universal-search-on-samsung-tv.md)
- [VIZIO](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/vizio.md): This section explains how to prepare, configure, and manage your Vizio application on the Vesper platform.
- [Developer Account Access](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/vizio/developer-account-access.md): To build your VIZIO app, Deltatre requires access to your VIZIO Partner Account (or equivalent)
- [Creatives](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/vizio/creatives.md): App creatives are the visual assets displayed in the App Store and within your application. To correctly display your application icon on VIZIO TVs, you must comply with VIZIO’s specifications.
- [Metadata](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/vizio/metadata.md): App metadata defines how your app appears and is discovered in the App Store. Providing complete, accurate information speeds up the review and approval process.
- [In-App-Purchases (IAPs)](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/vizio/in-app-purchases-iaps.md): To monetise your VIZIO app, you’ll need to set up payments and configure In-App Purchases (IAPs) in the VIZIO Partner portal, then map them to your licences on Vesper Back Office.
- [Testing](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/vizio/testing.md): Before publishing, you should test your VIZIO app to ensure quality. This helps catch issues and speeds up approval.
- [Universal Search on VIZIO](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/vizio/universal-search-on-vizio.md)
- [Web](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/web.md)
- [Microsoft (Xbox)](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/microsoft-xbox.md): This section explains how to prepare, configure, and manage your Xbox applications on the Vesper platform.
- [Developer Account Access](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/microsoft-xbox/developer-account-access.md): To build and manage your Xbox apps, Deltatre requires access to your Partner Center account so we can manage app submission, binaries, metadata, and release cycles on your behalf.
- [Creatives](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/microsoft-xbox/creatives.md): App creatives are the visual assets displayed in the Microsoft Store and within your application. To correctly display your application icon on Xbox, you must comply with Microsoft’s specifications.
- [Metadata](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/microsoft-xbox/metadata.md): Metadata defines how your app appears in the Microsoft Store: title, description, category, keywords, age ratings, supported languages,
- [In-App Purchases (IAPs)](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/microsoft-xbox/in-app-purchases-iaps.md): The Vesper platform does not currently support subscription-based In-App Purchases on Xbox. Subscription purchases must be handled externally, via the web checkout flow. IAPs for PPVs are supported.
- [Testing](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/microsoft-xbox/testing.md): Before publishing, you have the option to test your Xbox apps to ensure quality. This helps catch issues and speeds up approval.
- [Universal Search on Xbox](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/microsoft-xbox/universal-search-on-xbox.md): When a user searches via Xbox voice, text, or Cortana, your content can be displayed in Microsoft Store search and system-wide search results.
- [Firebase Push Notifications](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/analytics-integrations.md): Deltatre provides the following optional out-the-box tracking integrations, that can be implemented during the App build-phase.
- [TV Pin Login & QR Code](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/tv-pin-login-and-qr-code.md)
- [IAP Webhook Enablement](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/iap-webhook-enablement.md): The Vesper platform supports webhooks (a.k.a. real-time notifications) for Apple, Google, and Roku in-app purchases (IAPs).
- [App Pop-up Review Prompt](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/consumer-experience/consumer-experience-overview/application-build-and-submission/app-pop-up-review-prompt.md)

- [Migration of Watch Progress Data](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/user-management/user-management-overview/managing-a-data-migration/data-contract/migration-of-watch-progress-data.md): The watch progress data refers to all the data contributing to creating a viewing profile. This data should be captured in CSV format from your legacy platform before it is migrated to the Vesper plat
- [Migration of User profiles](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/user-management/user-management-overview/managing-a-data-migration/data-contract/migration-of-user-profiles.md): The user profile data refers to the customer profile.  This data should be captured in CSV format from your legacy platform before it is migrated to the Vesper platform,
