- [Legacy platform in read-only mode](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/user-management/user-management-overview/user-and-entitlement-onboarding-service/legacy-platform-in-read-only-mode.md)
- [Go/No Go for launch](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/user-management/user-management-overview/user-and-entitlement-onboarding-service/go-no-go-for-launch.md)
- [Service Live & Billing Activation](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/user-management/user-management-overview/user-and-entitlement-onboarding-service/service-live-and-billing-activation.md)
- [Post Go-Live activities and Monitoring](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/user-management/user-management-overview/user-and-entitlement-onboarding-service/post-go-live-activities-and-monitoring.md)
- [How To: Do Post Go-Live Monitoring](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/user-management/user-management-overview/user-and-entitlement-onboarding-service/post-go-live-activities-and-monitoring/how-to-do-post-go-live-monitoring.md)
- [Appendix](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/user-management/user-management-overview/user-and-entitlement-onboarding-service/appendix.md)
- [Appendix A - Data Contract](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/user-management/user-management-overview/user-and-entitlement-onboarding-service/appendix/appendix-a-data-contract.md)
- [Migration of User Data](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/user-management/user-management-overview/user-and-entitlement-onboarding-service/appendix/appendix-a-data-contract/migration-of-user-data.md)
- [Migration of Entitlement Data](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/user-management/user-management-overview/user-and-entitlement-onboarding-service/appendix/appendix-a-data-contract/migration-of-entitlement-data.md)
- [Migration of Watch Progress Data](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/user-management/user-management-overview/user-and-entitlement-onboarding-service/appendix/appendix-a-data-contract/migration-of-watch-progress-data.md): The watch progress data refers to all the data contributing to creating a viewing profile. This data should be captured in CSV format from your legacy platform before it is migrated to the Vesper plat
- [Migration of User profiles](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/user-management/user-management-overview/user-and-entitlement-onboarding-service/appendix/appendix-a-data-contract/migration-of-user-profiles.md): The user profile data refers to the customer profile.  This data should be captured in CSV format from your legacy platform before it is migrated to the Vesper platform,
- [Migration of User Favourites Data](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/user-management/user-management-overview/user-and-entitlement-onboarding-service/appendix/appendix-a-data-contract/migration-of-user-favourites-data.md)
- [Migration of User Watchlists Data](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/user-management/user-management-overview/user-and-entitlement-onboarding-service/appendix/appendix-a-data-contract/migration-of-user-watchlists-data.md)
- [Migration of External Entitlement Data](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/user-management/user-management-overview/user-and-entitlement-onboarding-service/appendix/appendix-a-data-contract/migration-of-external-entitlement-data.md)
- [Appendix B - Glossary of Data Migration Terms](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/user-management/user-management-overview/user-and-entitlement-onboarding-service/appendix/appendix-b-glossary-of-data-migration-terms.md)
- [Appendix C - File & Data Format Validation Reference Guide](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/user-management/user-management-overview/user-and-entitlement-onboarding-service/appendix/appendix-c-file-and-data-format-validation-reference-guide.md)
- [Appendix D - Integrity Check Reference Guide](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/user-management/user-management-overview/user-and-entitlement-onboarding-service/appendix/appendix-d-integrity-check-reference-guide.md)
- [Appendix E - Publish Status Guide](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/user-management/user-management-overview/user-and-entitlement-onboarding-service/appendix/appendix-e-publish-status-guide.md)
- [Appendix F - API Callback Response Messages Guide](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/user-management/user-management-overview/user-and-entitlement-onboarding-service/appendix/appendix-f-api-callback-response-messages-guide.md)
- [Appendix G - Grace Period](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/user-management/user-management-overview/user-and-entitlement-onboarding-service/appendix/appendix-g-grace-period.md)
- [Data Migrations - FAQ](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/user-management/user-management-overview/user-and-entitlement-onboarding-service/data-migrations-faq.md): These are some of the most commonly asked questions about the migration process.
- [Live Events & Delivery Overview](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/live-events-and-delivery/live-events-and-delivery-overview.md)
- [Live management - Self serve tool](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/live-events-and-delivery/live-events-and-delivery-overview/live-management-self-serve-tool.md): Live Management is a self-serve tool within Back Office that allows both internal teams and residents to create, launch, and manage live streaming events.
- [Video & Content Management Overview](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/video-and-content-management/video-and-content-management-overview.md)
- [Video Migration](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/video-and-content-management/video-and-content-management-overview/video-migration.md): Video migration onto a streaming platform refers to the process of transferring existing video content from onto the new streaming platform.
- [Batch Upload (Self Serve)](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/video-and-content-management/video-and-content-management-overview/video-migration/batch-upload-self-serve.md): This self serve video migration tool allows you to add up to 1000 videos directly onto our Vesper VOD platform via the ui. The tooling will also allow you to bulk update or delete files.
- [Video Prep](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/video-and-content-management/video-and-content-management-overview/video-migration/batch-upload-self-serve/video-prep.md): Your videos will need to be populated into a CSV file format and include specific fields.
- [Batch Upload](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/video-and-content-management/video-and-content-management-overview/video-migration/batch-upload-self-serve/batch-upload.md)
- [Batch validation](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/video-and-content-management/video-and-content-management-overview/video-migration/batch-upload-self-serve/batch-validation.md)
- [S3 Bucket Creation](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/video-and-content-management/video-and-content-management-overview/video-migration/batch-upload-self-serve/s3-bucket-creation.md): Amazon S3 bucket access is typically controlled through AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) credentials.
- [Migration via Onboarder API](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/video-and-content-management/video-and-content-management-overview/video-migration/migration-via-onboarder-api.md)
- [Showcasing Content](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/video-and-content-management/video-and-content-management-overview/showcasing-content.md): The Vesper platform is a one-stop shop for users to manage live and on-demand content so you can showcase the most engaging videos to your audience based on their preferences.
- [Live Video events](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/video-and-content-management/video-and-content-management-overview/showcasing-content/live-video-events.md)
- [Audio-only (radio) events](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/video-and-content-management/video-and-content-management-overview/showcasing-content/audio-only-radio-events.md)
- [Live Event Multi-View](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/video-and-content-management/video-and-content-management-overview/showcasing-content/live-event-multi-view.md)
- [Third Party Playback URLs](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/video-and-content-management/video-and-content-management-overview/showcasing-content/third-party-playback-urls.md)
- [Live Linear Channel](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/video-and-content-management/video-and-content-management-overview/showcasing-content/live-linear-channel.md)
- [Virtual Live Linears](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/video-and-content-management/video-and-content-management-overview/showcasing-content/virtual-live-linears.md)
- [Electronic Program Guide (EPG)](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/video-and-content-management/video-and-content-management-overview/showcasing-content/electronic-program-guide-epg.md)
- [EPG Feed Elements info](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/video-and-content-management/video-and-content-management-overview/showcasing-content/electronic-program-guide-epg/epg-feed-elements-info.md)
- [Video & Audio Specifications](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/video-and-content-management/video-and-content-management-overview/showcasing-content/video-and-audio-specifications.md): Video & Audio specifications define the quality, format, resolution, encoding, and other characteristics of your video and audio files.
- [Technical Specifications](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/video-and-content-management/video-and-content-management-overview/showcasing-content/video-and-audio-specifications/technical-specifications.md): This video reference guide is a crib sheet for the video & audio specs required on your streaming content.
- [Creative Specifications](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/video-and-content-management/video-and-content-management-overview/showcasing-content/video-and-audio-specifications/creative-specifications.md): This video reference guide is a crib sheet for where our video imagery is used.
- [Securing Content](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/video-and-content-management/video-and-content-management-overview/securing-content.md): Minimize the impact of piracy on your content, reduce account abuse, and safeguard your digital assets from unauthorized distribution with our portfolio of industry-leading security capabilities.
- [Setting up DRM (Digital Rights management)](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/video-and-content-management/video-and-content-management-overview/securing-content/setting-up-drm-digital-rights-management.md): Deltatre supports Multi-key DRM (Digital Rights Management) on Live and VOD
- [VPN Blocking](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/video-and-content-management/video-and-content-management-overview/securing-content/vpn-blocking.md)
- [Realm geoblocking](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/video-and-content-management/video-and-content-management-overview/securing-content/realm-geoblocking.md)
- [EXID injection](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/video-and-content-management/video-and-content-management-overview/securing-content/exid-injection.md)
- [Setting a Preset](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/video-and-content-management/video-and-content-management-overview/setting-a-preset.md)
- [Monetization Overview](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/monetization/monetization-overview.md)
- [Client Side Ad Integration (CSAI)](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/monetization/monetization-overview/client-side-ad-integration-csai.md): This section explains how to prepare, configure, and manage Client-Side Ad Insertion (CSAI) on the Vesper platform.
- [Planning](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/monetization/monetization-overview/client-side-ad-integration-csai/planning.md): The planning phase ensures that all advertising requirements are captured and the Ads team is fully aligned before configuration begins.
- [Server Side Ad Integration (SSAI)](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/monetization/monetization-overview/server-side-ad-integration-ssai.md): This section explains how to prepare, configure, and manage Server-Side Ad Insertion (SSAI) on the Vesper platform.
- [Planning](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/monetization/monetization-overview/server-side-ad-integration-ssai/planning.md): The planning phase ensures that all advertising requirements are captured and the Ads team is fully aligned before configuration begins.
- [Configuration](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/monetization/monetization-overview/server-side-ad-integration-ssai/configuration.md): Once the ads review has taken place, you're able to set up your SSAI via our Self serve UI on Vesper
- [Testing](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/monetization/monetization-overview/server-side-ad-integration-ssai/testing.md): Server-Side Ad Insertion (SSAI) is now fully integrated into the standard platform testing process.
- [Enabling Advertising](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/monetization/monetization-overview/enabling-advertising.md): Endeavor streaming supports advertising on both CSAI & SSAI today.
- [Configuring Licences](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/monetization/monetization-overview/configuring-licences.md)
- [Enabling Payment](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/monetization/monetization-overview/enabling-payment.md): Set up your streaming service so users subscribe or pay per view to access your content.
- [Apple Pay](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/monetization/monetization-overview/enabling-payment/apple-pay.md)
- [Google Wallet](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/monetization/monetization-overview/enabling-payment/google-wallet.md)
- [Stripe](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/monetization/monetization-overview/enabling-payment/stripe.md)
- [PayPal](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/monetization/monetization-overview/enabling-payment/paypal.md)
- [GCash](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/monetization/monetization-overview/enabling-payment/gcash.md)
- [iDEAL](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/monetization/monetization-overview/enabling-payment/ideal.md)
- [PIX](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/monetization/monetization-overview/enabling-payment/pix.md)
- [Zero balance checkout](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/monetization/monetization-overview/enabling-payment/zero-balance-checkout.md)
- [Cancellation discounts](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/monetization/monetization-overview/enabling-payment/cancellation-discounts.md)
- [Gifting](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/monetization/monetization-overview/enabling-payment/gifting.md)
- [Pause & Resume](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/monetization/monetization-overview/enabling-payment/pause-and-resume.md)
- [Free Trials](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/monetization/monetization-overview/enabling-payment/free-trials.md)
- [Enabling Live Like](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/monetization/monetization-overview/enabling-live-like.md): LiveLike is an audience engagement platform that transforms digital users into engaged fans through customized, interactive experiences.
- [Platform Analytics Overview](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/platform-insights-and-analytics/platform-analytics-overview.md)
- [Platform Analytics](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/platform-insights-and-analytics/platform-analytics-overview/platform-analytics.md)
- [Dashboards](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/platform-insights-and-analytics/platform-analytics-overview/platform-analytics/dashboards.md)
- [Reports](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/platform-insights-and-analytics/platform-analytics-overview/platform-analytics/reports.md)
- [Enabling Data Warehouse Sync](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/platform-insights-and-analytics/platform-analytics-overview/platform-analytics/enabling-data-warehouse-sync.md)
- [Real-Time Data Feed](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/platform-insights-and-analytics/platform-analytics-overview/platform-analytics/real-time-data-feed.md)
- [Predictive Analytics](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/platform-insights-and-analytics/platform-analytics-overview/platform-analytics/predictive-analytics.md)
- [Audience Targeting](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/platform-insights-and-analytics/platform-analytics-overview/platform-analytics/audience-targeting.md)
- [Setting up GTM](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/platform-insights-and-analytics/platform-analytics-overview/setting-up-gtm.md)
- [Uploading a Sitemap](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/platform-insights-and-analytics/platform-analytics-overview/uploading-a-sitemap.md): A sitemap is a blueprint of your website that helps search engines find, crawl and index all of your site's content.
- [Uploading a robots.txt](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/platform-insights-and-analytics/platform-analytics-overview/uploading-a-robots.txt.md): A robots.txt file tells search engine crawlers which URLs the crawler can access on your site.
- [Setting up Marketing Partner Management (MPM)](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/client-onboarding-documentation/platform-insights-and-analytics/platform-analytics-overview/setting-up-marketing-partner-management-mpm.md)

## Vesper Application Release Notes

- [Vesper Client Application Release Notes](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/application-release-notes/vesper-client-application-release-notes.md)
- [Vesper Mobile](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/application-release-notes/vesper-client-application-release-notes/vesper-mobile.md): Updates to the Vesper mobile application

- [Mobile Release 10.0.0](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/application-release-notes/vesper-client-application-release-notes/vesper-mobile/mobile-release-10.0.0.md)

- [Mobile Release 4.16](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/application-release-notes/vesper-client-application-release-notes/vesper-mobile/mobile-release-4/mobile-release-4.16.md)

- [UTV Release 3.14](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/application-release-notes/vesper-client-application-release-notes/vesper-unified-tv/utv-release-3.14.md)
- [UTV Release 3.13](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/application-release-notes/vesper-client-application-release-notes/vesper-unified-tv/utv-release-3.13.md)
- [UTV Release 3.12](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/application-release-notes/vesper-client-application-release-notes/vesper-unified-tv/utv-release-3.12.md)
- [UTV Release 3.11](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/application-release-notes/vesper-client-application-release-notes/vesper-unified-tv/utv-release-3.11.md)
- [UTV Release 3.10](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/application-release-notes/vesper-client-application-release-notes/vesper-unified-tv/utv-release-3.10.md)
- [UTV Release 3.9](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/application-release-notes/vesper-client-application-release-notes/vesper-unified-tv/utv-release-3.9.md)
- [UTV Release 3.8](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/application-release-notes/vesper-client-application-release-notes/vesper-unified-tv/utv-release-3.8.md)
- [UTV Release 3.7](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/application-release-notes/vesper-client-application-release-notes/vesper-unified-tv/utv-release-3.7.md)
- [Player Controls Enhancement Overview](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/application-release-notes/vesper-client-application-release-notes/vesper-unified-tv/utv-release-3.7/player-controls-enhancement-overview.md)

## Vesper Data Exports

- [Data Exports](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-exports.md)
- [Overview](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/mailman/overview.md)
- [FAQ](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/mailman/faq.md): Frequently Asked Questions related to the mailman service, reports, data streams and frontend events.
- [Overview](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/overview.md)
- [Reports](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/reports.md)
- [Introduction](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/reports/introduction.md)
- [How to Download a Report](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/reports/how-to-download-a-report.md)
- [How to Schedule a Report Delivery](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/reports/how-to-schedule-a-report-delivery.md)
- [Available Reports](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/reports/available-reports.md)
- [Customer Profile](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/reports/available-reports/customer-profile.md)
- [Guest Profile](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/reports/available-reports/guest-profile.md)
- [Customer Licence](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/reports/available-reports/customer-licence.md)
- [Revenue](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/reports/available-reports/revenue.md)
- [Transaction Summary](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/reports/available-reports/transaction-summary.md)
- [Discount Redemption](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/reports/available-reports/discount-redemption.md)
- [Promo Code](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/reports/available-reports/promo-code.md)
- [Gift Transaction](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/reports/available-reports/gift-transaction.md)
- [Licence Catalog](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/reports/available-reports/licence-catalog.md)
- [Vod Content Catalog](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/reports/available-reports/vod-content-catalog.md)
- [Live Content Catalog](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/reports/available-reports/live-content-catalog.md)
- [Playlist Contents](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/reports/available-reports/playlist-contents.md)
- [Playlist Catalog](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/reports/available-reports/playlist-catalog.md)
- [Season Catalog](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/reports/available-reports/season-catalog.md)
- [Series Catalog](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/reports/available-reports/series-catalog.md)
- [Live Viewership Report](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/reports/available-reports/live-viewership-report.md)
- [VOD Viewership](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/reports/available-reports/vod-viewership.md)
- [Viewership Summary](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/reports/available-reports/viewership-summary.md)
- [Peak Concurrency](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/reports/available-reports/peak-concurrency.md)
- [Active Viewer](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/reports/available-reports/active-viewer.md)
- [Data Sync Feeds](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/data-sync-feeds.md)
- [Introduction](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/data-sync-feeds/introduction.md)
- [Data Sync Feed File Definitions](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/data-sync-feeds/data-sync-feed-file-definitions.md)
- [Customer\_Profile](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/data-sync-feeds/data-sync-feed-file-definitions/customer_profile.md)
- [Customer\_Licence](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/data-sync-feeds/data-sync-feed-file-definitions/customer_licence.md)
- [Revenue](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/data-sync-feeds/data-sync-feed-file-definitions/revenue.md)
- [View\_Session](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/data-sync-feeds/data-sync-feed-file-definitions/view_session.md)
- [User\_Access\_History](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/data-sync-feeds/data-sync-feed-file-definitions/user_access_history.md)
- [Guest\_Profile](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/data-sync-feeds/data-sync-feed-file-definitions/guest_profile.md)
- [FAQ](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/data-sync-feeds/faq.md)
- [Helpful SQL for Key Metrics](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/data-sync-feeds/helpful-sql-for-key-metrics.md)
- [Secure Data File Transfer Guide](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/secure-data-file-transfer-guide.md)
- [Encrypted Data](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/secure-data-file-transfer-guide/encrypted-data.md)
- [Creating a PGP Key](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/secure-data-file-transfer-guide/creating-a-pgp-key.md)
- [Decrypting an encrypted data file](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/secure-data-file-transfer-guide/decrypting-an-encrypted-data-file.md)
- [Legacy Reports (Deprecated)](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/legacy-reports-deprecated.md)
- [Customer Report](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/legacy-reports-deprecated/customer-report.md): A list of all customers registered for a given realm and the current licence (subscription) status.
- [Customer Report (No PII)](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/legacy-reports-deprecated/customer-report-no-pii.md): A list of all customers registered for a given realm and the current licence (subscription) status. All Personally Identifiable Information is obfuscated in this version of the report.
- [Transaction Report](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/legacy-reports-deprecated/transaction-report.md): A list of all transactions for the last 31 days for a given realm.
- [Transaction Report (Extended)](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/legacy-reports-deprecated/transaction-report-extended.md): A list of all transactions for the last 31 days for a given realm.
- [VOD Catalogue](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/legacy-reports-deprecated/vod-catalogue.md): The content catalogue of VOD assets on the realm.
- [Live Event Catalogue](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/legacy-reports-deprecated/live-event-catalogue.md): The content catalog of live event assets on a realm.
- [Licence Catalogue](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/legacy-reports-deprecated/licence-catalogue.md): The list of all licences created on a realm
- [Promotional Code Campaigns](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/legacy-reports-deprecated/promotional-code-campaigns.md): A list of all current promotional code campaigns, including redemption metrics.
- [Peak Concurrency Report](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/legacy-reports-deprecated/peak-concurrency-report.md): A list of live events that occurred within the last 7 days and their peak concurrency.
- [Channel Catalogue](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/legacy-reports-deprecated/channel-catalogue.md): A catalogue of programmes scheduled on live channels.
- [Playlist Catalogue](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/legacy-reports-deprecated/playlist-catalogue.md): The content catalogue of VOD playlists.
- [Season Catalogue](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/legacy-reports-deprecated/season-catalogue.md): The content catalogue of VOD seasons.
- [Series Catalogue](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/legacy-reports-deprecated/series-catalogue.md): The content catalogue of VOD series (show)
- [Content Bucket Catalogue](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/legacy-reports-deprecated/content-bucket-catalogue.md): The catalogue of content buckets.
- [VOD Viewership Report](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/legacy-reports-deprecated/vod-viewership-report.md): A list of all VOD playback sessions that ended within a given ~3 day period.
- [Live Viewership Report](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/legacy-reports-deprecated/live-viewership-report.md): A list of all Live playback sessions that ended within a given ~3 day period.
- [Cohorts Report](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/legacy-reports-deprecated/cohorts-report.md): A report of all cohorts assigned to users at the time report is generated for a given realm.
- [Avalara Report](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/reporting/legacy-reports-deprecated/avalara-report.md): A list of all transactions upload to Avalara in the last 30 days.
- [Overview](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/overview.md)
- [Authentication and Account Events](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/authentication-and-account-events.md): Events relating to user data
- [SUCCESSFUL\_LOGIN](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/authentication-and-account-events/successful_login.md): Event raised when a customer successfully logs into Vesper.
- [FAILED\_LOGIN](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/authentication-and-account-events/failed_login.md): Event raised when a customer attempts to log in to DICE and it fails, either due to invalid credentials or user not found.
- [GUEST\_CHECKIN](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/authentication-and-account-events/guest_checkin.md): Event raised when a user requests a Guest Checkin token through an API request.
- [REGISTER\_USER](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/authentication-and-account-events/register_user.md): Event raised when a customer successfully registers an account on Vesper.
- [FAILED\_REGISTER\_USER](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/authentication-and-account-events/failed_register_user.md)
- [PIN\_LOGIN\_REQUEST](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/authentication-and-account-events/pin_login_request.md)
- [FAILED\_PIN\_REDEMPTION](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/authentication-and-account-events/failed_pin_redemption.md)
- [REFRESH\_TOKEN](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/authentication-and-account-events/refresh_token.md): Event raised when a refresh token is used to obtain a new Bearer token.
- [FAILED\_REFRESH\_TOKEN](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/authentication-and-account-events/failed_refresh_token.md)
- [RESET\_PASSWORD](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/authentication-and-account-events/reset_password.md): Event raised when a customer resets their password.
- [FAILED\_RESET\_PASSWORD](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/authentication-and-account-events/failed_reset_password.md): Event raised when a user fails to reset his password. Is triggered by invalid reset password token, blacklisted reset password token or suspended user resetting password
- [RESET\_PASSWORD\_REQUEST](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/authentication-and-account-events/reset_password_request.md): Event raised when a customer requests to reset their password, triggering a reset password email to be sent.
- [FAILED\_RESET\_PASSWORD\_REQUEST](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/authentication-and-account-events/failed_reset_password_request.md): Event raised when a user request to reset his password fails. Is triggered if user is not found or realm doesn’t exist
- [UPDATE\_PASSWORD](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/authentication-and-account-events/update_password.md): Event raised when a customer updates their password.
- [USER\_PREFERENCE](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/authentication-and-account-events/user_preference.md): Event raised when a customer updates a user preference on their account on Vesper.
- [CONSENT\_PROMPT](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/authentication-and-account-events/consent_prompt.md): Event raised when a customer updates a consent prompt answer on their account on Vesper.
- [USER\_UPDATED](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/authentication-and-account-events/user_updated.md): Event raised when any information initially submitted during registration (REGISTER\_USER) — such as registration date, country, town, or IP address — is changed or updated in the Vesper system.
- [USER\_DELETED](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/authentication-and-account-events/user_deleted.md): Event raised when a customer's account is deleted on Vesper.
- [PROFILE\_CREATED](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/authentication-and-account-events/profile_created.md): Event raised when a customer creates an account profile on Vesper.
- [PROFILE\_UPDATED](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/authentication-and-account-events/profile_updated.md): Event raised when an existing profile is modified in the Vesper system.
- [PROFILE\_DELETED](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/authentication-and-account-events/profile_deleted.md): Event raised when a customer's profile is deleted on Vesper.
- [USER\_PROFILE\_UPDATED](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/authentication-and-account-events/user_profile_updated.md): Event raised when user-profile–level statuses are updated in the Vesper system.
- [REGISTRATION\_CONFIRMATION](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/authentication-and-account-events/registration_confirmation.md): Event is raised when a customer successfully confirms, via the verification email received after registration, their email address — completing the signup process and creating an account on Vesper.
- [OPTIONAL\_PARTITIONS\_UPDATED](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/authentication-and-account-events/optional_partitions_updated.md): Event is raised when a customer updates their partitions (e.g., club or team affiliations) in their account preferences.
- [REFERRAL\_CONVERSION (registration)](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/authentication-and-account-events/referral_conversion-registration.md): Event is raised when a customer registers through a referral link, meaning their account creation was initiated from a referral campaign or affiliate link.
- [Playback Events](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/playback-events.md): Events tracking VOD and Live consumptions
- [VOD\_WATCHING\_START](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/playback-events/vod_watching_start.md): Event raised when a VOD playback session starts.
- [VOD\_WATCHING\_END](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/playback-events/vod_watching_end.md): Event raised when a VOD playback session ends.
- [LIVE\_WATCHING\_START](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/playback-events/live_watching_start.md): Event raised when a Live event stream playback session starts.
- [LIVE\_WATCHING\_END](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/playback-events/live_watching_end.md): Event raised when a Live event stream playback session ends.
- [USER\_ASKED\_FOR\_VOD\_STREAM](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/playback-events/user_asked_for_vod_stream.md): Event raised when user requests to playback a VOD.
- [USER\_ASKED\_FOR\_EVENT\_STREAM](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/playback-events/user_asked_for_event_stream.md): Event raised when user requests to playback a Live stream event.
- [VOD HEARTBEAT](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/playback-events/vod-heartbeat.md)
- [LIVE HEARTBEAT](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/playback-events/live-heartbeat.md)
- [SESSION\_ACCESS\_CHECK](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/playback-events/session_access_check.md): Event raised when the platform checks whether the customer has a valid entitlement, granted by their licence, to access the playback session.
- [Download Events](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/download-events.md): If you utilise downloadable content, events are available to track these actions
- [DOWNLOAD\_CONTENT\_REQUESTED](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/download-events/download_content_requested.md): Event raised when a customer requests to download a VOD and the entitlement to play offline.
- [DOWNLOAD\_CONTENT\_FINISHED](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/download-events/download_content_finished.md): Event raised when a customer's VOD download to the device has completed.
- [DOWNLOAD\_CONTENT\_DELETED](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/download-events/download_content_deleted.md): Event raised when a customer deletes a VOD download from their device.
- [DOWNLOAD\_CONTENT\_RENEWED](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/download-events/download_content_renewed.md): Event raised when a customer renews entitlement to play an already downloaded VOD offline.
- [Other User Related Events](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/other-user-related-events.md)
- [EVENT\_ADDED\_TO\_WATCH\_HISTORY](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/other-user-related-events/event_added_to_watch_history.md): Event raised when Live stream event is played to add this live stream event to user's watch history.
- [VOD\_ADDED\_TO\_FAVOURITES](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/other-user-related-events/vod_added_to_favourites.md)
- [VOD\_REMOVED\_FROM\_FAVOURITE](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/other-user-related-events/vod_removed_from_favourite.md)
- [VOD\_ADDED\_TO\_WATCHED](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/other-user-related-events/vod_added_to_watched.md): Event raised when a VOD is played to add to watched list.
- [TERMINATE\_SESSION](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/other-user-related-events/terminate_session.md): Event raised when the number of registered sessions exceeds the configured limit. This means the session on the field payload.data.cid gets blacklisted and should a heartbeat be received carrying this
- [Entitlement Events](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/entitlement-events.md)
- [ENTITLEMENT\_UPDATED](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/entitlement-events/entitlement_updated.md): Event raised every time a user gains, loses or maintains access to a particular entitlement, by being assigned a particular licence via purchasing, gift redemption or otherwise.
- [Admin Events](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/admin-events.md): Events relating to support/administrative actions taken on Dice Admin
- [ADMIN\_SUSPEND](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/admin-events/admin_suspend.md): Event raised when a DICE Admin user suspends a customer's account.
- [ADMIN\_ACTIVATED](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/admin-events/admin_activated.md): Event raised when a DICE Admin user reactivates a suspended customer's account.
- [LICENCE\_CREATED (Deprecated)](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/admin-events/licence_created-deprecated.md): Event raised when a DICE Admin user adds new licence.
- [LICENCE\_UPDATED (Deprecated)](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/admin-events/licence_updated-deprecated.md): Event raised when a DICE Admin user updates licence.
- [REALM\_CONSENT\_CONFIG\_UPDATED](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/admin-events/realm_consent_config_updated.md): Event is raised when a realm updates its configuration for consent fields. These configurations determine how CONSENT\_PROMPT event messages are structured and decoded for that specific realm.
- [PARENTAL\_CONTROL\_RESTRICTED\_VALUES](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/admin-events/parental_control_restricted_values.md): Event is raised when the restricted parental control rating values for a realm are updated, reflecting the latest list of content ratings or age restrictions applied to each country.
- [PARENTAL\_CONTROL\_STATUS](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/admin-events/parental_control_status.md): Event is raised when a realm’s parental control feature is enabled or disabled.
- [LICENCE\_UPDATE](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/admin-events/licence_update.md): Event is raised when any licence configuration — including its pricing, availability, geo/device restrictions, entitlement, IAP codes, or marketing metadata — is created or updated.
- [Content Events](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/content-events.md): In this section real time events generated from both the DVE and DGE are detailed. These are system events so will not contain geolocation for end users.
- [UPDATED\_VOD](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/content-events/updated_vod.md): Event raised from the DVE whenever a VOD state is updated. This event will only be emitted to the data stream when the VOD has been published, the first instance of this event in the data stream will
- [UPDATED\_PLAYLIST](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/content-events/updated_playlist.md): Event raised from the DVE whenever a VOD playlist is updated.
- [UPDATED\_VOD\_SEASON](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/content-events/updated_vod_season.md)
- [UPDATED\_VOD\_SERIES](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/content-events/updated_vod_series.md)
- [PLAYLIST\_RELATED\_VIDEO](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/content-events/playlist_related_video.md)
- [LIVESTREAMING\_EVENT\_UPDATED](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/content-events/livestreaming_event_updated.md): Event raised from the DGE whenever a Live Event state is updated.
- [EVENT\_WENT\_LIVE](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/content-events/event_went_live.md): Event raised from the DGE whenever a Live Event goes into a 'live' state.
- [EVENT\_WENT\_NOTLIVE](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/content-events/event_went_notlive.md): Event raised from the DGE whenever a Live Event in no longer in a 'live' state.
- [VOD\_WATCHING\_SESSION\_UPDATE](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/content-events/vod_watching_session_update.md)
- [LIVE\_WATCHING\_SESSION\_UPDATE](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/content-events/live_watching_session_update.md)
- [GEO\_TEMPLATE\_UPDATE](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/content-events/geo_template_update.md): Event is raised when a geo template configuration (used for defining whitelisted or blacklisted countries and ZIP codes) is created or updated in the DGE.
- [Payment Events](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/payment-events.md): In this section real time events generated from payments of licences are detailed. These are system events so will not contain geolocation for end users.
- [PROMO\_CAMPAIGN\_UPDATED](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/payment-events/promo_campaign_updated.md): Event is raised when details of a promotional campaign (such as discount configuration, geo restrictions, voucher setup, or validity period) are created or updated in the system.
- [SUCCESSFUL\_PURCHASE](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/payment-events/successful_purchase.md): Event raised when a successful purchase is made for a user, either an initial purchase or a recurring billing for an ongoing subscription.
- [FAILED\_VOUCHER\_REDEMPTION](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/payment-events/failed_voucher_redemption.md)
- [UNCONFIRMED\_PURCHASE](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/payment-events/unconfirmed_purchase.md): Event raised when a purchase is submitted for a user, either an initial purchase or a recurring billing for an ongoing subscription, but not yet confirmed with the payment provider. On the Dice platfo
- [CANCELLED\_PURCHASE](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/payment-events/cancelled_purchase.md): Event raised when a subscription ends. This can be raised when on the billing date after the user has deactivated their subscription, or when service admin cancels a user's subscription immediately.
- [LICENCE\_DEACTIVATED](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/payment-events/licence_deactivated.md): Event raised when a user cancels their ongoing subscription, i.e user clicks 'cancel' on their account, user will remain active until the billing date.
- [LICENCE\_REACTIVATED](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/payment-events/licence_reactivated.md): Event raised when a user reverses the deactivation of a licence, and wants to remain a subscriber.
- [LICENCE\_FAMILY\_UPDATED](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/payment-events/licence_family_updated.md)
- [REVOKED\_PURCHASE](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/payment-events/revoked_purchase.md): Event raised when the licence is revoked from the user. This could be either when payment has failed and maximum retries have been exhausted, or if the IAP receipt provided is found to be invalid.
- [REFUND\_PURCHASE](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/payment-events/refund_purchase.md): Event raised when a user is refunded an amount for a purchase. This event can occur when a customer is refunded by a customer service agent, or when a user upgrades a subscription and are refunded the
- [FAILED\_PAYMENT](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/payment-events/failed_payment.md): Event raised when a payment attempt is made and is unsuccessful.
- [USER\_NOT\_ELIGIBLE\_FOR\_TRIAL](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/payment-events/user_not_eligible_for_trial.md): Event raised when a user is not eligible for free trial due to failing one of the checks.
- [ADD\_CARD\_TO\_WALLET](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/payment-events/add_card_to_wallet.md): Event raised when a user adds a card to their account.
- [DELETE\_CARD\_FROM\_WALLET](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/payment-events/delete_card_from_wallet.md): Event raised when a user deletes a card to their account.
- [SWITCH\_CARD\_ON\_LICENCE](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/payment-events/switch_card_on_licence.md): Event raised when a user switches a card on a subscription licence so that the assigned card is charged on the next billing date.
- [DISPUTE\_RAISED](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/payment-events/dispute_raised.md): Event raised when a customer raises a dispute for a payment with their payment provider.
- [DISPUTE\_WON](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/payment-events/dispute_won.md): Event raised when a customer raises a dispute for a payment with their payment provider and the dispute is denied.
- [DISPUTE\_LOST](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/payment-events/dispute_lost.md): Event raised when a customer raises a dispute for a payment with their payment provider and the dispute is upheld. There will be a corresponding REVOKED\_PURCHASE with DISPUTE == true for this DISPUTE.
- [PAYMENT\_DETAIL\_INFO\_UPDATE](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/payment-events/payment_detail_info_update.md): Event raised when a customer attempts to checkout with a new card or adds a new card to their wallet.
- [REFERRAL\_CONVERSION (purchase)](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/payment-events/referral_conversion-purchase.md): Event is raised when a customer makes a successful purchase through a referral link — meaning the transaction was initiated via a referral campaign or partner program.
- [PAYMENT\_CHARGE](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/payment-events/payment_charge.md): Event raised when a payment is settled.
- [GIFT\_PURCHASE\_SUCCESSFUL](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/payment-events/gift_purchase_successful.md): Event raised when a customer successfully purchases a gift.
- [GIFT\_REDEMPTION\_SUCCESSFUL](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/payment-events/gift_redemption_successful.md): Event raised when a customer successfully redeems a gift.
- [GIFT\_CANCELLATION](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/payment-events/gift_cancellation.md): Event raised when a customer cancels a gift. The redeemer field on the response is optional and is only present if the gift being cancelled was already redeemed at the time of cancellation.
- [GIFT\_PURCHASE\_REFUND](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/payment-events/gift_purchase_refund.md): Event raised when a refund was issued for a gift purchase.
- [DISCOUNT\_CLAIMED](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/payment-events/discount_claimed.md): Event raised when a customer accepts a discount offer.
- [SUBSCRIPTION\_PAUSE\_INITIATED](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/payment-events/subscription_pause_initiated.md): Event raised when a customer attempts to pause a subscription.
- [SUBSCRIPTION\_PAUSED](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/payment-events/subscription_paused.md): An event raised when a subscription is paused.
- [SUBSCRIPTION\_RESUMED](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/payment-events/subscription_resumed.md): An event raised when a subscription is resumed after a pause.
- [CUSTOMER\_PRICE\_MIGRATION\_CONSENT](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/payment-events/customer_price_migration_consent.md): Event raised when a customer accepts, declines, or when a Price Version Migration (PVM) becomes effective for their licence.
- [PRICE\_MIGRATION\_ACTIVATED](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/payment-events/price_migration_activated.md): Event is raised when a PVM process is activated for a specific licence or SKU, initiating user notifications, consent collection (opt-in/opt-out), and the transition from one price version to another.
- [PRICE\_MIGRATION\_DELETED](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/payment-events/price_migration_deleted.md): Event is raised when a Price Version Migration (PVM) is deleted for a given licence.
- [CANCELLATION\_DISCOUNT](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/payment-events/cancellation_discount.md): Event is raised when details of a cancellation discount (such as discount configuration, geo restrictions, or validity period) are created or updated in the system.
- [SCHEDULED\_LICENCE\_DEACTIVATION](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/payment-events/scheduled_licence_deactivation.md): Event raised when a user requests cancellation during a minimum commitment period, and the system schedules the licence deactivation to occur at the end of the commitment window.
- [SCIM Events](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/scim-events.md)
- [USER\_ACTIVATION](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/scim-events/user_activation.md): Event raised when a customer redeems a Pending Activation User with External Entitlements
- [USER\_REVOKED](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/data-streams/scim-events/user_revoked.md): Event raised when a customer revokes Pending Activation User with External Entitlements
- [Configuring Events](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/configuring-events/configuring-events.md)

- [Sending Data to VI Services](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/events-to-vesper-insights/overview/sending-data-to-vi-services.md)
- [Event Legend](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/events-to-vesper-insights/overview/sending-data-to-vi-services/event-legend.md)
- [Authorization Event Flow](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/events-to-vesper-insights/overview/sending-data-to-vi-services/authorization-event-flow.md)
- [Account Event Flow](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/events-to-vesper-insights/overview/sending-data-to-vi-services/account-event-flow.md)
- [New Subscription Order Event Flow](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/events-to-vesper-insights/overview/sending-data-to-vi-services/new-subscription-order-event-flow.md)
- [Renewal Subscription Event Flow](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/events-to-vesper-insights/overview/sending-data-to-vi-services/renewal-subscription-event-flow.md)
- [Subscription Change Event Flow](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/events-to-vesper-insights/overview/sending-data-to-vi-services/subscription-change-event-flow.md)
- [Subscription Upgrade/Downgrade Event Flows](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/events-to-vesper-insights/overview/sending-data-to-vi-services/subscription-upgrade-downgrade-event-flows.md)
- [View Session Event Flow](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/events-to-vesper-insights/overview/sending-data-to-vi-services/view-session-event-flow.md)
- [Licence Catalog Update Event Flow](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/events-to-vesper-insights/overview/sending-data-to-vi-services/licence-catalog-update-event-flow.md)
- [Content Catalog Update Event Flows](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/events-to-vesper-insights/overview/sending-data-to-vi-services/content-catalog-update-event-flows.md)
- [Subscription Pause/Resume Event Flows](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/events-to-vesper-insights/overview/sending-data-to-vi-services/subscription-pause-resume-event-flows.md)
- [Gift Lifecycle Event Flows](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/events-to-vesper-insights/overview/sending-data-to-vi-services/gift-lifecycle-event-flows.md)
- [Promo Catalog Update Event Flow](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/events-to-vesper-insights/overview/sending-data-to-vi-services/promo-catalog-update-event-flow.md)
- [Cancellation Discount Catalog Update Event Flow](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/events-to-vesper-insights/overview/sending-data-to-vi-services/cancellation-discount-catalog-update-event-flow.md)
- [Discount Claimed Event Flow](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/events-to-vesper-insights/overview/sending-data-to-vi-services/discount-claimed-event-flow.md)
- [Authentication and Account Events](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/events-to-vesper-insights/authentication-and-account-events.md)
- [DS\_ID\_CONSENT\_PROMPT](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/events-to-vesper-insights/authentication-and-account-events/ds_id_consent_prompt.md): Event raised when a customer updates a consent prompt answer on their account on Vesper.
- [DS\_ID\_ADDRESS](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/events-to-vesper-insights/authentication-and-account-events/ds_id_address.md): Event raised when a customer updates a billing\_address on their account on Vesper.
- [DS\_ID\_PRINCIPAL](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/events-to-vesper-insights/authentication-and-account-events/ds_id_principal.md): Event raised when a customer updates their personal details (such as name or email) on Vesper.
- [DS\_ID\_REALM\_CONSENT](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/events-to-vesper-insights/authentication-and-account-events/ds_id_realm_consent.md): Event raised when a realm enables or disables a particular consent requirement.
- [DS\_ID\_DETACHED](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/events-to-vesper-insights/authentication-and-account-events/ds_id_detached.md): Event raised when a gift purchase is made for a recipient whose identity is not yet known, and only their email is available, resulting in a temporary customer\_exid being assigned.
- [Content Events](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/events-to-vesper-insights/content-events.md): In this section real time events generated from both the DVE and DGE are detailed. These are system events so will not contain geolocation for end users.
- [UPDATED\_VOD\_V2](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/events-to-vesper-insights/content-events/updated_vod_v2.md): Event raised from the DVE whenever a VOD state is updated. This event will only be emitted to the data stream when the VOD has been published.
- [DELETED\_VOD\_V2](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/events-to-vesper-insights/content-events/deleted_vod_v2.md): Event raised from the DVE whenever a VOD is deleted.
- [UPDATED\_VOD\_SEASON\_V2](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/events-to-vesper-insights/content-events/updated_vod_season_v2.md): Event raised when a VOD season is successfully updated in DVE.
- [DELETED\_VOD\_SEASON\_V2](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/events-to-vesper-insights/content-events/deleted_vod_season_v2.md): Event raised when a VOD season is deleted in DVE.
- [UPDATED\_VOD\_SERIES\_V2](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/events-to-vesper-insights/content-events/updated_vod_series_v2.md): Event raised when a VOD series is successfully updated in DVE.
- [DELETED\_VOD\_SERIES\_V2](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/events-to-vesper-insights/content-events/deleted_vod_series_v2.md): Event raised when a VOD series is deleted in DVE.
- [UPDATED\_LIVE\_EVENT\_V2](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/events-to-vesper-insights/content-events/updated_live_event_v2.md): Event raised from the DGE whenever a LIVE event is updated.
- [DELETED\_LIVE\_EVENT\_V2](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/events-to-vesper-insights/content-events/deleted_live_event_v2.md): Event raised from the DGE whenever a LIVE event is deleted.
- [UPDATED\_PLAYLIST\_V2](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/events-to-vesper-insights/content-events/updated_playlist_v2.md): Event raised from the DVE whenever a VOD playlist is updated.
- [DELETED\_PLAYLIST\_V2](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/events-to-vesper-insights/content-events/deleted_playlist_v2.md): Event raised from the DVE whenever a VOD playlist is deleted.
- [Admin Events](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/events-to-vesper-insights/admin-events.md): Events relating to support/administrative actions taken on Dice Admin
- [REALM\_CONSENT\_CONFIG\_UPDATED](https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/vesper-data-exports/events-to-vesper-insights/admin-events/realm_consent_config_updated.md): Event is raised when a realm updates its configuration for consent fields. These configurations determine how CONSENT\_PROMPT event messages are structured and decoded for that specific realm.


---

# Agent Instructions
This documentation is published with GitBook. GitBook is the documentation platform designed so that both humans and AI agents can read, navigate, and reason over technical content effectively. Learn more at gitbook.com.

## Querying This Documentation
If you need additional information, you can query the documentation dynamically by asking a question.
Perform an HTTP GET request on a page URL with the `ask` query parameter:
```
GET https://docs.onvesper.com/platform-knowledge-base/master.md?ask=<question>
```
The question should be specific, self-contained, and written in natural language.
The response will contain a direct answer to the question and relevant excerpts and sources from the documentation.
Use this mechanism when the answer is not explicitly present in the current page, you need clarification or additional context, or you want to retrieve related documentation sections.
